message:
test(widgets,extras): add 60+ edge-case tests for stateful widgets, measure cache fix, and visual effects benchmarks

Add comprehensive edge-case test coverage for the stateful widget system:
- StateKey: path construction, canonical form, hashing, equality, empty
  instance IDs, clone behavior, Debug formatting, HashMap usability
- StateStore: insert/get/remove/clear lifecycle, contains_key, typed
  downcast, entry count, independent key isolation
- StatefulWidget: lifecycle transitions (init → update → destroy),
  multi-widget coexistence, state persistence across updates, cleanup
  on destroy, fallback state detection

Additional changes:
- Fix measure_cache.rs: correct off-by-one or logic issue in cache
  invalidation
- Add criterion benchmark suite for visual_fx effects (underwater warp)
  with parameterized configurations
- Refine underwater_warp.rs effect calculations

Skip ephemeral files: 1, row_skip_dy2 (empty test artifacts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
